---
title: "Bulk Data Download Script (download_all_data.py)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```

## Overview

`inst/python/download_all_data.py` is a standalone Python script that bulk-downloads
all available election data from every supported source and saves the results as CSV
files under `data/`.  It is the fastest way to populate a local copy of the full
dataset without writing any R or Python code yourself.

All commands below assume you are in `inst/python/` with the virtual environment
activated:

```bash
cd inst/python
source ../../downBallotPython/bin/activate
```

---

## Quick Reference

| Goal | Command |
|---|---|
| Download everything | `python download_all_data.py` |
| One section only | `python download_all_data.py --section <name>` |
| One state (ElectionStats) | `python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state new_york` |
| Fast/lightweight mode | `python download_all_data.py --section municipal --fast` |
| Parallel workers | `python download_all_data.py --section state_elections --workers 4` |
| Preview without downloading | `python download_all_data.py --dry-run` |

---

## Command-line Options

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--section` | `all` | Which section to run. See [Sections](#sections) below. |
| `--state` | all states | Restrict `election_stats` to one state (e.g. `new_york`). |
| `--fast` | off | Use lightweight scrape modes (no vote counts). |
| `--workers N` | `1` | Number of parallel download threads. See [Parallelism](#parallelism). |
| `--output-dir PATH` | `<repo>/data/` | Root folder for output CSV files. |
| `--dry-run` | off | Print tasks without downloading anything. |

---

## Sections {#sections}

Pass one of the following names to `--section`, or omit to run all.

### `election_stats`

Scrapes ElectionStats / Civera sites for seven states.

```bash
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats
```

| State | Years | Granularity |
|---|---|---|
| Virginia | 1789–2025 | State, County |
| Massachusetts | 1970–2026 | State, County |
| Colorado | 1902–2024 | State, County |
| New Hampshire | 1970–2024 | State, County |
| South Carolina | 2008–2025 | State, County |
| New Mexico | 2000–2024 | State, County |
| New York | 1994–2024 | State, County |

**Output:**
```
data/election_stats/{state}/{state}_{year_from}_{year_to}_state.csv
data/election_stats/{state}/{state}_{year_from}_{year_to}_county.csv
```

**Single state:**
```bash
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state colorado
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state new_york
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state virginia
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state massachusetts
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state new_hampshire
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state south_carolina
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state new_mexico
```

> **Note:** South Carolina, New Mexico, and New York use a Playwright headless
> browser backend. Keep `--workers 1` when scraping those states.

---

### `nc`

Scrapes the NC State Board of Elections ZIP pipeline for precinct-level results.

```bash
python download_all_data.py --section nc
```

| Years | Granularity |
|---|---|
| 2000–2025 | Precinct, County, State |

**Output:**
```
data/nc_results/nc_2000_2025_precinct.csv
data/nc_results/nc_2000_2025_county.csv
data/nc_results/nc_2000_2025_state.csv
```

> North Carolina is unaffected by `--fast` — it always downloads all three
> granularity levels.

---

### `school_board`

Scrapes Ballotpedia school board elections for all 50 states + DC.

```bash
# Full mode — districts + candidate results (slow; thousands of requests/year)
python download_all_data.py --section school_board

# Fast mode — district metadata only (~1 request/year)
python download_all_data.py --section school_board --fast
```

| Years | Granularity |
|---|---|
| 2013–present | District, Candidate |

**Output:**
```
data/Ballotpedia/school_board/school_board_{year}.csv          # full
data/Ballotpedia/school_board/school_board_{year}_districts.csv # --fast
```

> **Note:** Full mode (`joined`) triggers Playwright for WAF-protected pages.
> Use `--workers 1` (the default) for reliability.

---

### `state_elections`

Scrapes Ballotpedia state election pages for all 50 states + DC.

```bash
# Full mode — vote counts per contest (many requests per state/year)
python download_all_data.py --section state_elections

# Fast mode — candidate listings only (~1 request per state/year)
python download_all_data.py --section state_elections --fast

# Parallel — safe for HTTP-only mode
python download_all_data.py --section state_elections --fast --workers 6
```

| Years | Election levels | Granularity |
|---|---|---|
| 2024–present | Federal, State, Local | Candidate, Office, Party, Votes |

**Output:**
```
data/Ballotpedia/state_elections/{state_slug}_{year}.csv
# e.g. data/Ballotpedia/state_elections/new_york_2024.csv
```

---

### `municipal`

Scrapes Ballotpedia municipal and mayoral election pages.

```bash
# Full mode — candidate + vote data (one extra request per location)
python download_all_data.py --section municipal

# Fast mode — location index + sub-URLs only (no vote data)
python download_all_data.py --section municipal --fast

# Parallel fast mode (recommended starting point)
python download_all_data.py --section municipal --fast --workers 4
```

Downloads run **most recent year first** (e.g. 2026 → 2014).

| Race type | Years | Coverage |
|---|---|---|
| All municipal | 2014–present | City, county, and mayoral races |
| Mayoral only | 2020–present | Mayoral races only |

**Output:**
```
data/Ballotpedia/municipal/municipal_all_{year}.csv
data/Ballotpedia/municipal/municipal_mayoral_{year}.csv
```

---

## Fast Mode {#fast-mode}

`--fast` switches every section to a lightweight scrape that skips vote counts
and detail pages.  Use it for a quick structural survey before committing to a
full download.

| Section | Default (full) | `--fast` |
|---|---|---|
| `school_board` | `mode=joined` — districts + candidate results | `mode=districts` — district metadata only |
| `state_elections` | `mode=results` — follows each contest URL for vote counts | `mode=listings` — candidate names, offices, parties, status |
| `municipal` | `mode=results` — full candidate + vote data per location | `mode=links` — location index + sub-URLs only |
| `election_stats` | always full | always full |
| `nc` | always full | always full |

---

## Parallelism {#parallelism}

`--workers N` runs up to N tasks simultaneously using Python threads.

```bash
# State elections — safe to parallelise (pure HTTP)
python download_all_data.py --section state_elections --workers 4

# Municipal fast mode — safe to parallelise
python download_all_data.py --section municipal --fast --workers 6

# Municipal full mode — moderate parallelism
python download_all_data.py --section municipal --workers 3

# ElectionStats classic states only — safe to parallelise
python download_all_data.py --section election_stats --state virginia --workers 1
```

**Recommended worker counts:**

| Section | Recommended workers |
|---|---|
| `state_elections` | 4–8 |
| `municipal --fast` | 4–8 |
| `municipal` (full) | 2–3 |
| `election_stats` (VA / MA / CO / NH) | 4 |
| `election_stats` (includes SC / NM / NY) | 1 |
| `school_board` full | 1 |
| `nc` | 1 |

> **Why the limit?** South Carolina, New Mexico, New York (ElectionStats), and
> `school_board` full mode all use a Playwright headless Chromium browser.
> Playwright's synchronous API is not thread-safe, so running multiple Playwright
> tasks in parallel can cause crashes.  HTTP-only sections (classic ElectionStats
> states, `state_elections`, `municipal --fast`) are safe to parallelise.

---

## Output Directory Layout

```
data/
  election_stats/
    virginia/
      virginia_1789_2025_state.csv
      virginia_1789_2025_county.csv
    massachusetts/
      ...
    colorado/  new_hampshire/  south_carolina/  new_mexico/  new_york/

  nc_results/
    nc_2000_2025_precinct.csv
    nc_2000_2025_county.csv
    nc_2000_2025_state.csv

  Ballotpedia/
    school_board/
      school_board_2013.csv
      school_board_2014.csv
      ...
    state_elections/
      alabama_2024.csv
      alaska_2024.csv
      ...
    municipal/
      municipal_all_2026.csv
      municipal_all_2025.csv
      ...
      municipal_mayoral_2026.csv
      ...
```

---

## Re-running After Failures

The script **skips files that already exist**.  If a run is interrupted or a
year fails, simply re-run the same command — completed years will be skipped
and only missing files will be downloaded.

```bash
# Resume a partial municipal download
python download_all_data.py --section municipal
```

To force a re-download, delete the relevant CSV file first.

---

## Dry Run

Preview all tasks without downloading anything:

```bash
python download_all_data.py --dry-run
python download_all_data.py --section municipal --dry-run
```

---

## Data Coverage Summary

| Source | States/Scope | Years | Granularity | Contents |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ElectionStats | Virginia | 1789–2025 | State, County | Candidate results + county vote counts |
| ElectionStats | Massachusetts | 1970–2026 | State, County | Candidate results + county vote counts |
| ElectionStats | Colorado | 1902–2024 | State, County | Candidate results + county vote counts |
| ElectionStats | New Hampshire | 1970–2024 | State, County | Candidate results + county vote counts |
| ElectionStats | South Carolina | 2008–2025 | State, County | Candidate results + county vote counts |
| ElectionStats | New Mexico | 2000–2024 | State, County | Candidate results + county vote counts |
| ElectionStats | New York | 1994–2024 | State, County | Candidate results + county vote counts |
| NC State Board | North Carolina | 2000–2025 | Precinct, County, State | Raw precinct results aggregated up |
| Ballotpedia | All 50 states + DC | 2013–present | District | School board districts + candidates + votes |
| Ballotpedia | All 50 states + DC | 2024–present | Federal/State/Local | State election candidates + vote counts |
| Ballotpedia | All 50 states + DC | 2014–present | Municipality | Municipal candidate + vote data |
| Ballotpedia | All 50 states + DC | 2020–present | Municipality | Mayoral candidate + vote data |
